title: Redesign Timeline.jsx — solid vertical accent bar, mono year labels, red dots, flat cards
acceptance_criteria: Replace animated line draw (height-based --progress animation) with solid vertical bar of --color-accent red
lineTrackStyle: 1px solid var(--color-hairline) background track
lineDrawStyle: remove gradient, replace with solid var(--color-accent) background
Remove borderRadius from lineDrawStyle
Remove boxShadow from lineDrawStyle
Remove --progress CSS variable and IntersectionObserver-driven height animation
Dot: replace double-bezel dot (outer+inner with border-radius) with single solid red circle
dotOuterStyle: no border-radius hack, just 12px circle with var(--color-accent) bg
Active dot: slightly brighter or larger, no glow/shadow
Year label: JetBrains Mono, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.05em
Year tag style: replace accent-cyan with accent-red, no border-radius, no bg
TimelineItem content: replace card-shell/card-core with direct solid bg + 1px border
Remove box-shadow from timeline cards
Remove gradient from timeline cards
Eyebrow style in Stack component: no border-radius, mono font
StackPill: remove magnetic hover lift animation (translate/scale on mouse move)
StackPill: simplify to solid border tags, no shadow-glow on hover
Stack component section: brutalist border-t hairline, consistent padding
Keep IntersectionObserver-based reveal for scroll triggering
Keep TimelineItem layout (alternating left/right on desktop) intact
